message:
fix(leak): cap tmux CC guarded output buffer to prevent unbounded growth [ft-3kxe.1]

The tmux control channel parser accumulated output lines between %begin
and %end markers without any size limit. A long-running command or
malformed stream could cause unbounded String growth in Guarded.output.

Added MAX_GUARDED_OUTPUT_LEN (1 MiB) cap — when exceeded, the guarded
block is discarded with a warning log. This complements the existing
DCS, sixel, and tcap size caps in the escape parser.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
